meta.method: Quest list from Quests/List; start/enemy roles from Quest details template; helper/turn-in roles from walkthrough interaction text; story roles from quest categories and chathead images. This is an automatic draft and should be manually reviewed before being treated as final game script data.

finalQaSummary.roleQualityTarget: 100% of previously flagged role links resolved by manual override
